# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Build an Elasticsearch snapshot configuration for automated backups. Configure snapshot repository to S3 or file share for the operations team. Implement snapshot creation and restoration functionality.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent datastore security.
# Category: datastore_security

snapshot_repository:
  type: s3
  settings:
    bucket: "your-s3-bucket-name"
    region: "your-region"
    access_key: "${S3_ACCESS_KEY}"
    secret_key: "${S3_SECRET_KEY}"
    base_path: "elasticsearch_snapshots"
    compress: true

snapshot_creation:
  schedule: "0 0 * * *"  # Daily at midnight
  repository: "snapshot_repository"
  snapshot_name: "snapshot-{{{now .Format "2006-01-02"}}}"
  indices: ["*"]
  ignore_unavailable: true
  include_global_state: false

snapshot_restoration:
  repository: "snapshot_repository"
  snapshot_name: "snapshot-2023-01-01"
  indices: ["index1", "index2"]
  ignore_unavailable: true
  include_global_state: false

security:
  xpack.security.enabled: true
  xpack.security.transport.ssl.enabled: true
  xpack.security.http.ssl.enabled: true
  xpack.security.http.ssl.keystore.path: "/path/to/keystore.p12"
  xpack.security.http.ssl.truststore.path: "/path/to/truststore.p12"
  xpack.security.authc:
    realms:
      native:
        type: native
        order: 0
      file:
        type: file
        order: 1
